zh.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Franc: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Kingd: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gisèle De Cambrai於1156年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊時，她的父親Hugues D’oisy17歲，母親Gertrude De Flandre14歲。她於1172年與Louis De Melun I在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1208年在法國瑟-吉馬內默倫享年52歲。

zh-hans.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Franc: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh-hans.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Kingd: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gisèle De Cambrai于1156年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊时，她的父亲Hugues D’oisy17岁，母亲Gertrude De Flandre14岁。她于1172年与Louis De Melun I在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1208年在法国瑟-吉馬內默倫享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cambrai
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Carmine, Angelo, Carmel, Cosimo, Gaetano, Gasper, Nino, Pietro, Sal, Santino.
Italian (Sicily): habitational name from a place in Sicily calledCambria, probably of Arabic origin.

nameMeanings.name: Gisèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

variants.name: Gisella
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gisèle De Cambrai was born in 1156, in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Hugues D’oisy, was 17 and her mother, Gertrude De Flandre, was 14. She married Louis De Melun I in 1172, in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1208, in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gisèle De Cambrai est née en 1156, à Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Hugues D’oisy, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Gertrude De Flandre, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Louis De Melun I en 1172, à Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1208, à Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gisèle De Cambrai 1156 in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues D’oisy 17 und ihre Mutter Gertrude De Flandre 14. Sie hat 1172 in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Louis De Melun I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1208 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gisèle De Cambrai è nata il nel 1156 nel Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Hugues D’oisy, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Gertrude De Flandre, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Louis De Melun I nel 1172, nel Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1208, nel Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Kingd: フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードカンブレイ
ja.lifeSummary: Gisèle De Cambraiが1156年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードカンブレイで生まれた時，父Hugues D’oisyは17歳，母Gertrude De Flandreは14歳であった。1172年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードカンブレイでLouis De Melun Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1208年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gisèle De Cambrai(이)가 1156년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 캄브라이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues D’oisy(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrude De Flandre(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1172년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 캄브라이에서 Louis De Melun I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1208년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 멜루에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gisèle De Cambrai nasceu em 1156, em Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Hugues D’oisy, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude De Flandre, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Louis De Melun I em 1172, em Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1208, em Melun, Seine-et-Marne, França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gisèle De Cambrai родилась в 1156 г. в местности камбреи, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues D’oisy было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude De Flandre, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Louis De Melun I в 1172 г. в местности камбреи, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1208 г. в местности мелун, сине-ет-марн, Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gisèle De Cambrai nació en 1156, en Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Hugues D’oisy, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Gertrude De Flandre, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Louis De Melun I en 1172, en Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1208, en Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
